untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'three-line candle formation' pattern which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The source data references performance metrics (success rates, average returns by volume trend and breakout direction) that require pattern recognition logic beyond simple indicator comparisons. Additionally, 'BULL_MARKET' and 'BEAR_MARKET' are not in the ALLOWED REGIMES list.
translation_notes: Attempted to construct volume trend logic: rising volume entry (long) and falling volume entry (short) with average candle volume below 20-period historical volatility. Exit conditions are simple reversals. The three-line candle formation itself requires candlestick pattern recognition not available in the indicator set. Performance data from source (7.82%, 5.84%, -5.97%, -10.26% for rising volume; 6.21%, 10.64%, -5.28%, -5.96% for falling volume) cannot be operationalized without explicit pattern detection.
